title: First Day at Work 第一天上班

lines.en: Good morning. I am the new hire, Alex.
Welcome! Let me show you around the office.
lines.zh: 欢迎！我带你参观一下办公室。

lines.en: Thank you. Where is my desk?
Right over here. Your computer is already set up.
lines.zh: 就在这里，你的电脑已经设置好了。

lines.en: Great. What time do we usually have lunch?
lines.zh: 太好了。我们通常几点吃午饭？

lines.en: Most people go at noon. The cafeteria is on the third floor.
lines.zh: 大多数人中午去。食堂在三楼。

lines.en: I see. Who should I ask if I have questions?
lines.zh: 明白了。如果有问题我应该问谁？

lines.en: You can come to me anytime. Also, Sarah will be your mentor.
lines.zh: 你可以随时来找我。另外，Sarah会是你的导师。

lines.en: That is very helpful. Thank you so much.
